---
title: "DMEA"
author: "Belinda B. Garana"
date: "2025-01-14"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# load packages
if (!require(panSEA)) {
  if (!require("devtools", quietly = TRUE))
  install.packages("devtools")
  
  devtools::install_github("BelindaBGarana/panSEA", "add-tie-handling")
}

library(plyr);library(dplyr);library(ggplot2);library(synapser);library(panSEA)
library(data.table); library(RColorBrewer)
#source("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PNNL-CompBio/MPNST_Chr8/refs/heads/main/panSEA_helper_20240913.R")

# load helper functions
#source("https://github.com/PNNL-CompBio/coderdata/blob/main/build/lincs/05-LINCS_perturbations.R")
get_CCLE_RNA <- function(hgnc = FALSE) {
  message("Loading adherent CCLE RNA-seq data version 19Q4")
  if (hgnc) {
    if (!file.exists("Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_approved_symbols_only_1-200.Rbin")) {
      download.file(
        paste0(
          "https://raw.github.com/BelindaBGarana/DMEA/shiny-app/Inputs/",
          "Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_approved_symbols_only_1-200.Rbin"
        ),
        destfile =
          "Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_approved_symbols_only_1-200.Rbin"
      )
    }
    
    if (!file.exists("Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_approved_symbols_only_201-327.Rbin")) {
      download.file(
        paste0(
          "https://raw.github.com/BelindaBGarana/DMEA/shiny-app/Inputs/",
          "Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_approved_symbols_only_201-327.Rbin"
        ),
        destfile =
          "Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_approved_symbols_only_201-327.Rbin"
      )
    }
    
    RNA.first200 <- readRDS("Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_approved_symbols_only_1-200.Rbin")
    RNA.rest <- readRDS("Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_approved_symbols_only_201-327.Rbin")
    RNA.df <- rbind(RNA.first200, RNA.rest) 
  } else {
    if (!file.exists("Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_1-200.Rbin")) {
      download.file(
        paste0(
          "https://raw.github.com/BelindaBGarana/DMEA/shiny-app/Inputs/",
          "Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_1-200.Rbin"
        ),
        destfile =
          "Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_1-200.Rbin"
      )
    }
    
    if (!file.exists("Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_201-327.Rbin")) {
      download.file(
        paste0(
          "https://raw.github.com/BelindaBGarana/DMEA/shiny-app/Inputs/",
          "Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_201-327.Rbin"
        ),
        destfile =
          "Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_201-327.Rbin"
      )
    }
    
    load("Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_1-200.Rbin")
    load("Normalized_adherent_CCLE_RNAseq_19Q4_samples_in_PRISM_201-327.Rbin")
    RNA.df <- rbind(RNA.first200, RNA.rest) 
  }
  return(RNA.df)
}
```

## load inputs
```{r load inputs, echo = FALSE}
synapser::synLogin()
# RNA-seq data with HGNC symbols (update once batch-corrected)
degs <- read.csv(synapser::synGet('syn64397743')$path) # 1312039 genes
degs <- degs[degs$hgnc_symbol != "" & !is.na(degs$hgnc_symbol),]
degs <- degs[degs$Drug != "Irinotecan",] # since irinotecan isn't metabolically active
colnames(degs)[ncol(degs)] <- "Gene"
colnames(degs)[4] <- "Log2FC"
degs$padj <- as.numeric(degs$padj)
degs <- degs[degs$padj <= 0.05,]
length(na.omit(unique(degs$Gene))) # 11194

# CCLE RNA-seq with HGNC symbols
ccle <- get_CCLE_RNA(hgnc = TRUE)

# reduce to overlapping genes
degs <- degs[degs$Gene %in% colnames(ccle)[2:ncol(ccle)],]
length(na.omit(unique(degs$Gene))) # 2880
ccle <- ccle[,c("CCLE_ID", degs$Gene)]
degs$Log2FC <- as.numeric(degs$Log2FC)

# PRISM drug sensitivity (i.e., AUC)
prism <- read.csv(file = paste0("https://raw.github.com/BelindaBGarana/",
        "DMEA/shiny-app/Inputs/PRISM_drug_mean_AUC_6-23-21.csv"))
prism$X <- NULL

# PRISM drug mechanism of action annotations
gmt.drug <- GSA::GSA.read.gmt(file = paste0(
          "https://raw.github.com/BelindaBGarana/DMEA/shiny-app/",
          "Inputs/MOA_gmt_file_n6_no_special_chars.gmt"))

```

## run DMEA
```{r DMEA, echo = FALSE}
drug.info <- list("CDK inhibitor" = c("Palbociclib","Ribociclib"),
                  "Chemotherapy" = "Trabectedin",
                  "DNA alkylating agent" = "Ifosfamide",
                  "DNA methyltransferase inhibitor" = "Decitabine",
                  "HDAC inhibitor" = "Vorinostat",
                  "MEK inhibitor" = c("Mirdametinib","Selumetinib","Trametinib"),
                  "MET inhibitor" = "Capmatinib",
                  "PARP inhibitor" = "Olaparib",
                  "SHP2 inhibitor" = c("RMC4630","TNO155"),
                  "topoisomerase inhibitor" = c("Doxorubicin", "Irinotecan"),
                  "TEADi" = "Verteporfin")
# compare treated vs. untreated
# DMEA NES < 0: drug mechanisms which may be more toxic to treated samples
synapse_id <- "syn64618500"
timepoints <- na.omit(unique(degs$Timepoint))
mpnst <- na.omit(unique(degs$individualID))
base.path <- getwd()
dmea.path <- file.path(base.path, "DMEA")
dir.create("DMEA")
setwd("DMEA")

dmea.sens <- list()
drug.corr.sens <- list()
for (i in timepoints) {
  cat(i, "\n") 
  
  # filter for time
  time.deg <- degs[degs$Timepoint == i,]
  
  temp.dmea.sens <- list()
  temp.drug.corr.sens <- list()
  
  # prep inputs for each drug
  drug.degs <- list()
  expr <- list()
  all.drugs <- na.omit(unique(time.deg$Drug))
  for (j in all.drugs) {
    cat(j,"(",which(all.drugs == j),"/",length(all.drugs),"drugs)\n")
    temp.deg <- na.omit(dplyr::distinct(
      time.deg[time.deg$Drug == j,
                c("Gene","Log2FC")]))
    if (any(duplicated(temp.deg$Gene))) {
      cat("resolving duplicates\n")
      temp.deg <- plyr::ddply(temp.deg, .(Gene), summarize,
                              Log2FC = mean(Log2FC))
    }
    temp.deg <- temp.deg[temp.deg$Gene %in% colnames(ccle)[2:ncol(ccle)],]
    if (nrow(temp.deg) > 0) {
      drug.degs[[j]] <- temp.deg
      expr[[j]] <- ccle[,c("CCLE_ID", temp.deg$Gene)]
    }
  }
  
  # also run analysis for each drug
  drugResults <- panSEA::mDMEA(drug.sensitivity = prism, gmt = gmt.drug,
                                 expression = expr, weights = drug.degs,
                                 types = names(drug.degs), scatter.plots=FALSE)

  temp.dmea.sens.df <- drugResults$compiled.results$result
  
  # also compile drug correlations
  drug.corr.list <- list()
  for (j in all.drugs) {
    drug.corr.list[[j]] <- drugResults$all.results[[j]]$corr.result
  }
  temp.drug.corr.sens.df <- data.table::rbindlist(drug.corr.list, use.names = TRUE, idcol = "DrugTreatment")
  colnames(temp.dmea.sens.df)[1] <- "DrugTreatment"
  drug.corr.sens[[as.character(i)]] <- temp.drug.corr.sens.df
  dmea.sens[[as.character(i)]] <- temp.dmea.sens.df
}
setwd(dmea.path)
drug.corr.sens.df <- data.table::rbindlist(drug.corr.sens, use.names=TRUE, idcol="Time")
dmea.sens.df <- data.table::rbindlist(dmea.sens, use.names=TRUE, idcol="Time")
write.csv(dmea.sens.df,"DMEA_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(drug.corr.sens.df,"DMEA_correlations.csv", row.names = FALSE)
synapser::synStore(synapser::File("DMEA_results.csv", parent=synapse_id))
synapser::synStore(synapser::File("DMEA_correlations.csv", parent=synapse_id))
```

### plot number of correlated drugs, enriched MOAs
```{r plot # of results, echo = FALSE}
## drug mechanisms
# prep data
library(plyr);library(dplyr);library(ggplot2);library(patchwork)
base.path <- getwd()
dmea.path <- file.path(base.path, "DMEA")
setwd(dmea.path)
dmea.sens.df <- read.csv("DMEA_results.csv")
drug.corr.sens.df <- read.csv("DMEA_correlations.csv")
drug.corr.sens.df$DrugTreatment <- factor(drug.corr.sens.df$DrugTreatment, levels=sort(unique(unlist(drug.info))))
dmea.sens.df$DrugTreatment <- factor(dmea.sens.df$DrugTreatment, levels=sort(unique(unlist(drug.info))))
timepoints <- unique(drug.corr.sens.df$Time)
drug.corr.sens.df$Time <- factor(drug.corr.sens.df$Time, levels=timepoints)
dmea.sens.df$Time <- factor(dmea.sens.df$Time, levels=timepoints)
all.drugs <- levels(dmea.sens.df$DrugTreatment)
all.drugs <- all.drugs[all.drugs %in% dmea.sens.df$DrugTreatment]
all.moas <- sort(names(drug.info)[unlist(drug.info) %in% dmea.sens.df$DrugTreatment])
drugCol <- colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(length(all.drugs),"Set3"))(length(all.drugs)) # need color ramp for >12 colors
names(drugCol) <- all.drugs

sig.dmea <- dmea.sens.df[dmea.sens.df$FDR_q_value < 0.25 & 
                           dmea.sens.df$p_value < 0.05,]
nMOAs.overall <- plyr::ddply(sig.dmea, .(DrugTreatment, Time), dplyr::summarize,
                    N = length(na.omit(unique(Drug_set))))

# are there more/less enriched drug MOAs at 8h vs. 24h? 2-sided p=0.05422887; 1-sided: more at 24h (p=0.02711443)
cat("Overall", "# of MOAs enriched at 8h vs. 24h\n")
t.test(nMOAs.overall[nMOAs.overall$Time=="8h",]$N,
       nMOAs.overall[nMOAs.overall$Time=="24h",]$N)
test <- t.test(nMOAs.overall[nMOAs.overall$Time=="8h",]$N,
       nMOAs.overall[nMOAs.overall$Time=="24h",]$N, "less")

nMOAs.overall$moa <- NA
for (i in 1:length(drug.info)) {
  if (any(nMOAs.overall$DrugTreatment %in% drug.info[[i]])) {
   nMOAs.overall[nMOAs.overall$DrugTreatment %in% drug.info[[i]],]$moa <- names(drug.info)[i]
  }
}

# generate plot
nMOAs.overall$moa <- factor(nMOAs.overall$moa, levels=sort(na.omit(unique(nMOAs.overall$moa))))
nMOA.plot.overall <- ggplot2::ggplot(nMOAs.overall, aes(x=Time, y=N)) + geom_violin(alpha=0) +
  geom_point(aes(color=DrugTreatment, shape=moa)) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.2, alpha = 0) + scale_color_manual(limits=all.drugs, values=drugCol) +
  labs(x="Time (Hours)", y="# of Enriched Drug Mechanisms",
       color = "Drug Treatment", shape = "Mechanism") +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(all.moas), breaks=all.moas) + theme_classic(base_size=12) +
  theme(legend.box="horizontal")
ggplot2::ggsave("N_enrichedDrugMechanisms_overall.pdf", nMOA.plot.overall, width=5.5, height=4)

## drugs
# prep data
sig.drug.corr <- drug.corr.sens.df[drug.corr.sens.df$Pearson.q < 0.05,]
nDrugs.overall <- plyr::ddply(sig.drug.corr, .(DrugTreatment, Time), dplyr::summarize,
                    N = length(na.omit(unique(Drug))))

# are there more/less correlated drugs at 8h vs. 24h? No: p-value = 0.4324531
cat("Overall", "# of drugs correlated at 8h vs. 24h\n")
t.test(nDrugs.overall[nDrugs.overall$Time=="8h",]$N,
       nDrugs.overall[nDrugs.overall$Time=="24h",]$N)

nDrugs.overall$moa <- NA
for (i in 1:length(drug.info)) {
  if (any(nDrugs.overall$DrugTreatment %in% drug.info[[i]])) {
   nDrugs.overall[nDrugs.overall$DrugTreatment %in% drug.info[[i]],]$moa <- names(drug.info)[i]
  }
}

# generate plot
nDrugs.overall$moa <- factor(nDrugs.overall$moa, levels=sort(na.omit(unique(nDrugs.overall$moa))))
nDrug.plot.overall <- ggplot2::ggplot(nDrugs.overall, aes(x=Time, y=N)) + geom_violin(alpha=0) +
  geom_point(aes(color=DrugTreatment, shape=moa)) + scale_color_manual(limits=all.drugs, values=drugCol) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.2, alpha = 0) + 
  scale_y_continuous(trans="log10") + labs(x="Time (Hours)", y="Log(# of Correlated Drugs)",
                                           color = "Drug Treatment", shape = "Mechanism") +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:length(all.moas), breaks=all.moas) + theme_classic(base_size=12) +
  theme(legend.box="horizontal")
ggplot2::ggsave("N_correlatedDrugs_overall.pdf", nDrug.plot.overall, width=5.5, height=4)

patchN.plot.overall <- nMOA.plot.overall + nDrug.plot.overall + patchwork::plot_layout(guides="collect") #& theme(legend.box="horizontal")
ggplot2::ggsave("N_drugsAndMOAs_overall.pdf", patchN.plot.overall, width=8, height=4)
ggplot2::ggsave("N_drugsAndMOAs_overall_taller.pdf", patchN.plot.overall, width=8, height=10)
```

### plot all enriched MOAs
```{r plot all results, echo = FALSE}

library(plyr);library(dplyr);library(ggplot2)
dmea.path <- file.path(getwd(),"DMEA")
setwd(dmea.path)

topSets <- unique(dmea.sens.df[dmea.sens.df$sig,]$Drug_set)
mean.results <- plyr::ddply(dmea.sens.df, .(Drug_set), summarize,
                            NES = mean(NES, na.rm=TRUE))
setOrder <- mean.results[order(mean.results$NES),]$Drug_set
setFace <- rep("plain", length(setOrder))
names(setFace) <- setOrder
setFace[names(drug.info)] <- "bold"

drugsInTopSets <- unlist(drug.info[topSets])
tested.drugs <- na.omit(unique(dmea.sens.df$DrugTreatment))
drugsInTopSets <- drugsInTopSets[drugsInTopSets %in% tested.drugs]
inputDrugs <- unique(unlist(drug.info))[unique(unlist(drug.info)) %in% tested.drugs]
inputFace <- rep("plain", length(inputDrugs))
names(inputFace) <- inputDrugs
inputFace[drugsInTopSets] <- "bold"

dot.df <- dmea.sens.df#[dmea.sens.df$Drug_set %in% topSets,]
dot.df$Time <- factor(dot.df$Time, levels=timepoints)
if (any(dot.df$FDR_q_value == 0)) {
  dot.df[dot.df$FDR_q_value == 0,]$FDR_q_value <- 0.0001
}
dot.df$minusLogP <- -log(dot.df[,"p_value"], base = 10)
dot.df$minusLogFDR <- -log(dot.df[,"FDR_q_value"], base = 10)
maxAbsNES <- ceiling(max(abs(dot.df$NES)))
dot.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  na.omit(dot.df),
  ggplot2::aes(
    x = DrugTreatment, y = Drug_set, color = NES,
    size = minusLogFDR
  )
) +
  ggplot2::geom_point() +
  ggplot2::scale_y_discrete(limits = setOrder) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(limits=names(inputFace)) +
  scale_color_gradient2(low="blue",high="red", mid="grey", 
                        limits=c(-maxAbsNES, maxAbsNES)) +
  #viridis::scale_color_viridis() +
  theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = "Drug Treatment (Input)",
    y = "Drug Mechanism (Output)",
    color = "NES", size = "-log(FDR)"
  ) + 
  theme(axis.text.y=element_text(face=setFace), 
        axis.text.x=element_text(face=inputFace,angle=45, vjust=1, hjust=1)) +
  geom_point(data = subset(dot.df, sig), col = "black", stroke = 1.5, shape = 21) +
  facet_grid(.~Time)
dot.plot
# most are only in prot and not in RNA
ggplot2::ggsave("Enriched_MOAs_dotPlot.pdf", dot.plot, width=10, height=20)

```

### plot top correlated drugs, enriched MOAs
```{r plot top results, echo = FALSE}
library(plyr);library(dplyr);library(ggplot2)
dmea.path <- file.path(getwd(),"DMEA")
setwd(dmea.path)

moa.info2 <- dplyr::distinct(nMOAs.overall[,c("DrugTreatment","moa")])

n.top.list <- c(1, 2, 3, 5)
for (n.top in n.top.list) {
  ### MOA
  topSigMOA <- data.frame()
  for (i in tested.drugs) {
    tempSig <- dmea.sens.df[dmea.sens.df$DrugTreatment == i &
                              dmea.sens.df$sig,] %>% slice_max(abs(NES), n=n.top)
    topSigMOA <- rbind(topSigMOA, tempSig)
  }
  length(unique(topSigMOA$Drug_set)) # 20
  dot.df <- dmea.sens.df[dmea.sens.df$Drug_set %in% unique(topSigMOA$Drug_set),]
  # shorten names as needed
  if ("PDGFR tyrosine kinase receptor inhibitor" %in% dot.df$Drug_set) {
    dot.df[dot.df$Drug_set == "PDGFR tyrosine kinase receptor inhibitor",]$Drug_set <- "PDGFR inhibitor"
  }
  
  mean.results <- plyr::ddply(dot.df, .(Drug_set), summarize,
                              NES = mean(NES, na.rm=TRUE))
  setOrder <- mean.results[order(mean.results$NES),]$Drug_set
  #drugOrder <- unlist(drug.info)
  
  dot.df$Time <- factor(dot.df$Time, levels=timepoints)
  if (any(dot.df$FDR_q_value == 0)) {
    dot.df[dot.df$FDR_q_value == 0,]$FDR_q_value <- 0.0001
  }
  dot.df$minusLogP <- -log(dot.df[,"p_value"], base = 10)
  dot.df$minusLogFDR <- -log(dot.df[,"FDR_q_value"], base = 10)
  maxAbsNES <- ceiling(max(abs(dot.df$NES)))
  dot.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    na.omit(dot.df),
    ggplot2::aes(
      x = DrugTreatment, y = Drug_set, color = NES,
      size = minusLogFDR
    )
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point() +
    ggplot2::scale_y_discrete(limits = setOrder) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(limits=all.drugs) +
    scale_color_gradient2(low="blue",high="red", mid="grey", 
                          limits=c(-maxAbsNES, maxAbsNES)) +
    #viridis::scale_color_viridis() +
    theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      x = "Drug Treatment (Input)",
      y = "Drug Mechanism (Output)",
      color = "NES", size = "-log(FDR)"
    ) + 
    theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, vjust=1, hjust=1)) +
    geom_point(data = subset(dot.df, sig), col = "black", stroke = 1.5, shape = 21) +
    facet_grid(.~Time)
  dot.plot
  ggplot2::ggsave(paste0(n.top,"_topEnrichedMOAs_dotPlot.pdf"), dot.plot, width=10, height=ifelse(n.top*1.5<3,3,n.top))
  ggplot2::ggsave(paste0(n.top,"_topEnrichedMOAs_dotPlot_littleTaller.pdf"), dot.plot, width=10, height=ifelse(n.top*2<4.5,4.5,n.top*1.5))
  ggplot2::ggsave(paste0(n.top,"_topEnrichedMOAs_dotPlot_littleTallerWider.pdf"), dot.plot, width=12, height=ifelse(n.top*2<4.5,4.5,n.top*1.5))
  ggplot2::ggsave(paste0(n.top,"_topEnrichedMOAs_dotPlot_taller.pdf"), dot.plot, width=10, height=ifelse(n.top*3<6,6,n.top*2))
  ggplot2::ggsave(paste0(n.top,"_topEnrichedMOAs_dotPlot_tallerWider.pdf"), dot.plot, width=12, height=ifelse(n.top*3<6,6,n.top*2))
  
  # create tile plot for drug MOA annotations
  moa.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(moa.info2, aes(x=DrugTreatment,y=1, fill=moa)) + 
  geom_tile() + scale_x_discrete(limits=drugOrder) + theme_classic(base_size=12) +
  theme(axis.ticks=element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), axis.title=element_blank(),
        axis.line=element_blank()) + labs(fill="Drug Mechanism")
ggplot2::ggsave("MOA_annotations.pdf", moa.plot, width=6,height=3)
  
  ### Drug correlations
  topSigDrug <- data.frame()
  for (i in tested.drugs) {
    tempSig <- drug.corr.sens.df[drug.corr.sens.df$DrugTreatment == i &
                                   drug.corr.sens.df$Pearson.q <= 0.05,] %>% slice_max(abs(Pearson.est), n=n.top)
    topSigDrug <- rbind(topSigDrug, tempSig)
  }
  cat("Number of top correlated drugs:", length(unique(topSigDrug$Drug)))
  dot.df <- dmea.sens.df[dmea.sens.df$Drug %in% unique(topSigMOA$Drug_set),]
  mean.results <- plyr::ddply(drug.corr.sens.df[drug.corr.sens.df$Drug %in% topSigDrug$Drug,], .(Drug), summarize,
                              Pearson.est = mean(Pearson.est, na.rm=TRUE))
  setOrder <- mean.results[order(mean.results$Pearson.est),]$Drug
  
  dot.df <- drug.corr.sens.df#[drug.corr.sens.df$Drug %in% topSets,]
  dot.df$Time <- factor(dot.df$Time, levels=timepoints)
  if (any(dot.df$FDR_q_value == 0)) {
    dot.df[dot.df$FDR_q_value == 0,]$FDR_q_value <- 0.0001
  }
  dot.df$minusLogP <- -log(dot.df$Pearson.p, base = 10)
  dot.df$minusLogFDR <- -log(dot.df$Pearson.q, base = 10)
  maxAbsPearson.est <- ceiling(max(abs(dot.df$Pearson.est)))
  dot.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    na.omit(dot.df),
    ggplot2::aes(
      x = DrugTreatment, y = Drug, color = Pearson.est,
      size = minusLogFDR
    )
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point() +
    ggplot2::scale_y_discrete(limits = setOrder) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(limits=drugOrder) +
    scale_color_gradient2(low="blue",high="red", mid="grey", 
                          limits=c(-maxAbsPearson.est, maxAbsPearson.est)) +
    #viridis::scale_color_viridis() +
    theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      x = "Drug Treatment (Input)",
      y = "Drug (Output)",
      color = "Pearson r", size = "-log(FDR)"
    ) + 
    theme( 
      axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45, vjust=1, hjust=1)) +
    geom_point(data = subset(dot.df, Pearson.q <= 0.05), col = "black", stroke = 1.5, shape = 21) +
    facet_grid(.~Time)
  dot.plot
  # most are only in prot and not in RNA
  ggplot2::ggsave(paste0(n.top,"_topCorrelatedDrugs_dotPlot.pdf"), dot.plot, width=10, height=ifelse(4*n.top<5,5,3*n.top))
}
```


### plot validations
```{r plot validation results, echo = FALSE}

library(plyr);library(dplyr);library(ggplot2)
dmea.path <- file.path(getwd(),"DMEA")
setwd(dmea.path)
### MOA
topSets <- names(drug.info)
sigTopSets <- topSets[topSets %in% dmea.sens.df[dmea.sens.df$sig,]$Drug_set]
validations <- data.frame()
for (i in names(drug.info)) {
  temp.valid <- dmea.sens.df[dmea.sens.df$Drug_set == i &
                               dmea.sens.df$DrugTreatment %in% drug.info[[i]] &
                               dmea.sens.df$sig,]
  validations <- rbind(validations, temp.valid)
}
validTopSets <- unique(validations$Drug_set)
mean.results <- plyr::ddply(dmea.sens.df[dmea.sens.df$Drug_set %in% topSets,], .(Drug_set), summarize,
                            NES = mean(NES, na.rm=TRUE))
setOrder <- mean.results[order(mean.results$NES),]$Drug_set
setFace <- rep("plain", length(setOrder))
names(setFace) <- setOrder
setFace[validTopSets] <- "bold"

drugsInTopSets <- unlist(drug.info[topSets])
drugsInValidTopSets <- unlist(drug.info[validTopSets])
tested.drugs <- na.omit(unique(dmea.sens.df$DrugTreatment))
drugsInValidTopSets <- drugsInValidTopSets[drugsInValidTopSets %in% tested.drugs]
inputDrugs <- unique(unlist(drug.info))[unique(unlist(drug.info)) %in% tested.drugs]
inputFace <- rep("plain", length(inputDrugs))
names(inputFace) <- inputDrugs
inputFace[drugsInValidTopSets] <- "bold"

dot.df <- dmea.sens.df[dmea.sens.df$Drug_set %in% names(drug.info),]
dot.df$Time <- factor(dot.df$Time, levels=timepoints)
if (any(dot.df$FDR_q_value == 0)) {
  dot.df[dot.df$FDR_q_value == 0,]$FDR_q_value <- 0.0001
}
dot.df$minusLogP <- -log(dot.df[,"p_value"], base = 10)
dot.df$minusLogFDR <- -log(dot.df[,"FDR_q_value"], base = 10)
maxAbsNES <- ceiling(max(abs(dot.df$NES)))
dot.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  na.omit(dot.df),
  ggplot2::aes(
    x = DrugTreatment, y = Drug_set, color = NES,
    size = minusLogFDR
  )
) +
  ggplot2::geom_point() +
  ggplot2::scale_y_discrete(limits = setOrder) +
  ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(limits=names(inputFace)) +
  scale_color_gradient2(low="blue",high="red", mid="grey", 
                        limits=c(-maxAbsNES, maxAbsNES)) +
  #viridis::scale_color_viridis() +
  theme_minimal(base_size=12) +
  ggplot2::labs(
    x = "Drug Treatment (Input)",
    y = "Drug Mechanism (Output)",
    color = "NES", size = "-log(FDR)"
  ) + 
  theme(axis.text.y=element_text(face=setFace), 
        axis.text.x=element_text(face=inputFace,
          angle=45, vjust=1, hjust=1),
        legend.box="horizontal") +
  geom_point(data = subset(dot.df, sig), col = "black", stroke = 1.5, shape = 21) +
  facet_grid(.~Time)
dot.plot
# most are only in prot and not in RNA
ggplot2::ggsave("Validation_MOAs_dotPlot.pdf", dot.plot, width=10, height=3)

# also plot just sig validations as scatter plot over time
validations$Time <- as.character(validations$Time)
validations$Time <- as.numeric(substr(validations$Time, 1, nchar(validations$Time)-1))
validations$Drug_set <- factor(validations$Drug_set, levels=sort(na.omit(unique(validations$Drug_set))))
validation.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(validations, aes(x=Time, y=NES, color=DrugTreatment)) + 
  geom_point(aes(shape=Drug_set)) + geom_smooth(method="lm", se = FALSE, linetype="dashed") + #geom_line(linetype="dashed") +
  scale_x_continuous(trans="log10") +
  labs(x="Time (Hours)", y="Normalized Enrichment Score",
       color = "Drug Treatment", shape = "Mechanism") +
  scale_shape_manual(values=1:nlevels(validations$Drug_set)) + theme_classic(base_size=12) +
  theme(legend.box="horizontal")
ggplot2::ggsave("validatedDrugMechanisms_scatterPlot.pdf", validation.plot, width=8, height=3)

### Drug correlations
drugValidations <- drug.corr.sens.df[tolower(drug.corr.sens.df$Drug) == tolower(drug.corr.sens.df$DrugTreatment) &
                                       drug.corr.sens.df$Pearson.q <= 0.05,] # 0
drugValidations$Time <- as.character(drugValidations$Time)
drugValidations$Time <- as.numeric(substr(drugValidations$Time, 1, nchar(drugValidations$Time)-1))
validation.plot <- ggplot2::ggplot(drugValidations, aes(x=Time, y=Pearson.est, color=DrugTreatment)) + 
  geom_point() + geom_smooth(method="lm", se = FALSE, linetype="dashed") + #geom_line(linetype="dashed") +
  scale_x_continuous(trans="log10") +
  labs(x="Time (Hours)", y="Pearson r",
       color = "Drug Treatment") + theme_classic(base_size=12) +
  theme(legend.box="horizontal")
ggplot2::ggsave("validatedDrugs_scatterPlot.pdf", validation.plot, width=5.5, height=3)
```


### upset plots to see overlap across drug treatments
```{r plot overlap of results, echo = FALSE}
library(ComplexHeatmap)
dmea.path <- file.path(getwd(),"DMEA")
setwd(dmea.path)
# inspired by: https://jokergoo.github.io/ComplexHeatmap-reference/book/upset-plot.html#upset-making-the-plot
moa.info2 <- moa.info2[order(unique(unlist(drug.info))),]
myCol <- as.list(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(length(drug.info), "Set3"))
names(myCol) <- names(drug.info)
moaAnnotation <- ComplexHeatmap::HeatmapAnnotation(Mechanism = moa.info2$moa, col = myCol, which="row")

# generate list of significant results
sigList <- list()
for (i in unique(unlist(drug.info))) {
  if (nrow(dmea.sens.df[dmea.sens.df$DrugTreatment == i & dmea.sens.df$sig,]) > 0) {
    sigList[[i]] <- na.omit(unique(dmea.sens.df[dmea.sens.df$DrugTreatment == i & 
                                                  dmea.sens.df$sig,]$Drug_set)) 
  }
}

if (length(sigList) > 1) {
  # convert to matrix
  myPlot = ComplexHeatmap::make_comb_mat(sigList)
  #ComplexHeatmap::UpSet(m, right_annotation = moaAnnotation)
  pdf(file.path(dmea.path,"enrichedMOA_upsetPlot.pdf"))
  up <- ComplexHeatmap::UpSet(myPlot)
  draw(up)
  dev.off()
}
# could also repeat for individual timepoints or filtered for "optimal" timepoints (max validation / inhibition of known targets) 
```
